title: Allow objects to be assigned to a variable of a base class

features.name: class_inheritance_with_extends
features.description: Code should include a class inheritance declaration using the extends keyword where a derived class inherits from a base class
features.snippet:
class B; endclass
class C extends B; endclass

features.name: base_class_object_assignment_upcast
features.description: Code should include an assignment of a derived class object to a base class variable, demonstrating upcasting behavior in SystemVerilog OOP
